caption: The video captures a scene of a public speaking event or presentation taking place in a room with wooden blinds covering the windows. A man, dressed in a white shirt and dark vest, stands at a podium with a microphone, addressing an audience seated in rows of chairs. The audience appears attentive, with some individuals turning their heads slightly to listen more closely. To the left of the speaker, another person is seated at a desk, possibly moderating or assisting with the event. The setting suggests a formal yet intimate gathering, likely focused on a specific topic or discussion, as indicated by the "ORCA" logo visible in the corner of the screen. The atmosphere seems engaged and respectful, with the audience members actively participating in the event.
